verse_text: So Jonah arose and went to Nineveh, just as the Lord spoke. Nineveh was an exceedingly great city to God, a journey of about three days.

links.context: Scholars agree that Nineveh was overthrown in 612 BC. Jonah warned of the fall ([[JON.3:3]], [[JON.3:4]]) and Nahum, in his book, records it.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
